name: omarchy_prompt
content:
Prompt 
Omarchy ships with a minima Starship prompt by defaut. That's how I ike to keep my
prompt. I don't need to know the user, because it's aways me, and I don't need to know
the time, because it's aways at the top.
If you want more information or stye, you can change the Starship.rs configuration in
~/.config/starship.toml . There's a ot you can do. Just don't go overboard (or do go
overboard, do whatever you want, it's your computer!
Prompt · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/95/prompt
1 of 2 2/2/26, 1:26 AM
